name: Coda
description: Preference-first personalization for Claude. Learns what you care about and injects the right preferences into every task.
long_description: Coda is a personalization control layer that sits on top of Claude. Instead of storing raw conversation history, it builds structured preference objects — your tone, format, goals, constraints — scoped to task types. A writing task gets your writing preferences. A coding task gets your coding preferences. Confidence scores update automatically based on whether you accept, edit, or reject outputs. Includes an inspection console at localhost:3456 so you always know what Coda told Claude and why.

tools.name: coda_get_preferences
tools.description: Get ranked preferences for the current task type

tools.name: coda_log_feedback
tools.description: Log accept/edit/reject signal to sharpen confidence scores

tools.name: coda_upsert_preference
tools.description: Create or update a preference object

tools.name: coda_explain_retrieval
tools.description: Explain why specific preferences were returned

tools.name: coda_import_from_mem0
tools.description: Import and structure raw Mem0 memories into Coda

db_path.title: Database path
db_path.description: Where to store the Coda SQLite database. Leave blank for default (next to server.py).
